title: FrustrationSignal

id.description: Stable URN identifying this signal record (urn:srcos:frustration:<id>).

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

sessionRef.description: URN of the AgentSession in which this signal was observed.

count.description: Optional occurrence count when the same signal was triggered multiple times.

capturedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the signal was captured.

description: A telemetry record capturing a negative user-experience signal observed during an agent session, used for quality monitoring, session review, and model-improvement feedback loops.
